name: Pembina Pipeline Corporation
description: Pembina Pipeline Corporation is a leading energy transportation and midstream service provider that has been serving North America's energy industry for 70 years. Headquartered in Calgary, the company provides critical infrastructure and services to connect energy producers and consumers. Pembina operates an integrated network of pipelines, processing facilities, and storage assets, while also focusing on new ventures and sustainability. Through its commitment to operational excellence and community engagement, Pembina delivers energy solutions that support the global market while striving to improve the quality of life and sustainability of the communities where it operates.
